facebook.content: You are not just a husband or wife, you are a priest. You are a priest unto your spouse and unto the Lord. You have the authority to pronounce blessings, to declare righteousness, and to create an atmosphere of favor in your home. As the scripture says, "You shall call His name Jesus, for He shall save His people from their sins." (Matthew 1:21). What kind of priest are you? Are you proclaiming blessings or curses in your marriage?
facebook.fullPost:
You are not just a husband or wife, you are a priest. You are a priest unto your spouse and unto the Lord. You have the authority to pronounce blessings, to declare righteousness, and to create an atmosphere of favor in your home. As the scripture says, "You shall call His name Jesus, for He shall save His people from their sins." (Matthew 1:21). What kind of priest are you? Are you proclaiming blessings or curses in your marriage?

Watch the full teaching
https://increasingfaith.net/teachings.html

#Discipleship #IncreasingFaith #KingdomTeaching

instagram.content:
You were made for partnership, not control.

When you operate in control, you're living from a spirit of competition, not collaboration.

But when you partner with God and others, you'll see the fruit of true unity and the power of multiplication.

"I am the vine, you are the branches; apart from me you can do nothing." - John 15:5

Are you living in control or partnership today?
